name: LinkedIn
description: Sync LinkedIn profile, posts, and company pages into the Shielva knowledge base via the LinkedIn REST API v2 using OAuth 2.0.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: From LinkedIn Developers → Your App → Auth → Application credentials → Client ID

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.help: From LinkedIn Developers → Your App → Auth → Application credentials → Client Secret

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Optional. The OAuth redirect URI registered in your LinkedIn App. Leave blank to use the Shielva default.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate client_id and client_secret. If an access_token is already configured, probe GET /me.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return the LinkedIn OAuth2 authorization URL with required scopes.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /me and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE. Includes authenticated member name.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of LinkedIn profile, member posts, and organization pages.

methods.name: Get Profile
methods.description: GET /me with projection for id, name, picture, and headline.

methods.name: Get Email Address
methods.description: GET /emailAddress to retrieve the member's primary email.

methods.name: List Posts
methods.description: Retrieve recent shares/posts for a given author URN.

methods.name: Get Organization
methods.description: Retrieve an organization (company page) by numeric ID.

methods.name: List Organization Posts
methods.description: Retrieve recent shares posted by an organization URN.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Return the LinkedIn OAuth2 authorization URL.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping GET /me and return current health with the member's display name.

apis.name: Sync Records
apis.description: Sync LinkedIn profile, member posts, and organization pages.
